caption: Three people are seated on a stage in front of a dark blue background with neon purple accents. On the left, a man with curly dark hair wears a white button-down shirt and grey trousers, sitting behind a small white table made of LEGO bricks. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt and dark pants. To the right, a man wears a grey suit jacket over a light blue shirt and grey trousers. They are all seated in light-colored wooden chairs. Behind them, a glowing red sign displays the text "SL". Across the sequence, the man on the right speaks, gesturing with his right hand. The woman listens and slightly shifts her posture, while the man on the left remains relatively still, looking toward the speaker. The lighting remains constant as the individuals engage in a panel-style conversation.
